query_title: The Little World of Don Camillo

recommendations.title: The Return of Don Camillo
recommendations.overview: Energetic priest Don Camillo returns to the town of Brescello for more political and personal duels with Communist mayor Peppone.

recommendations.title: God Willing
recommendations.overview: The son of an atheist, authoritarian father, believed to be liberal, wants to become a priest.

recommendations.title: Metropolis
recommendations.overview: In a futuristic city sharply divided between the rich and the poor, the son of the city's mastermind meets a prophet who predicts the coming of a savior to mediate their differences.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
recommendations.overview: While Po and his father are visiting a secret panda village, an evil spirit threatens all of China, forcing Po to form a ragtag army to fight back.

recommendations.title: Nausicaä of the Valley of the Wind

recommendations.title: Normandy Nude
recommendations.overview: At the Mêle sur Sarthe, a small Norman village, farmers are affected by a crisis. Georges Balbuzard, the mayor of the city, is not one to let them down and decides to try everything to save his village...

recommendations.title: Nazarín
recommendations.overview: A Catholic priest in a poor community lives a charitable life in accordance with his religious principles, but others do not return the favor.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda

recommendations.title: Rich Flu

recommendations.title: My Little Pony: A New Generation
recommendations.overview: Equestria's divided. But a bright-eyed hero believes Earth Ponies, Pegasi and Unicorns should be pals — and, hoof to heart, she’s determined to prove it.
